abstract: OpenClaw is a god-tier AI assistant designed to function as a self-hosted agent that automates tasks, manages workflows, and executes code. It is not a passive chatbot but a persistent digital employee that can interact with your files, APIs, and systems. This guide is for users who want to avoid costly mistakes, prevent token burnout, and unlock maximum productivity without overspending. The outcome enabled is a scalable, low-cost, high-performance AI workflow that operates reliably 24/7 — turn

source_article.title: 10 Things I Wish I Knew Before Using OpenClaw
source_article.author: @ManiClones
